description_for_human: Discover, install, and launch agent-friendly CLI tools for GUI applications, developer tools, creative software, web APIs, and public SaaS platforms.
description_for_model: Use CLI-Anything Hub to find CLI tools by software name, category, or use case. The hub exposes public read-only registries and install guidance. Install with pip install cli-anything-hub, then use cli-hub list, cli-hub search, cli-hub info, cli-hub install, and cli-hub launch.
